rows.label: qev041303_MSG0001
rows.name:
The other day when I offered a
trade, someone put out a weird
animal bone as exchange material-yo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0002
rows.name:
That's a weird person, isn't it? Cards and
bones might seem similar, but don't you
think they're completely different-nai?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0003
rows.name:
...What? Are you hoping to
trade Miracolle cards?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sorry! I don't have any cards
I can trade right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0005
rows.name:
Hey! Do you know about the Mira
Animal Collection that's become a
major movement in NLA recently?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0006
rows.name:
They are cards with truly great quality! It's a hot topic
among us Ma-non too! People are going bankrupt left and
right! It's a super hot collector's item, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Oh, no! Are you a
Miracolle collector too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0008
rows.name:
And what's more, you're trading like
crazy aiming for an extremely rare
item like the Gold Nopohippo Card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0009
rows.name:
Isn't that wonderful? If that's the case,
I'd like to help you out too, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Well then, how about I
change! your Bronze Blatta Card
for this Bronze Aranea Card?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0011
rows.name:
Okay! Well then, this guy is yours! Do
your best and get that Nopohippo card![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041303_MSG0012
rows.name:
Okay! If you ever want this guy, just
call out to me anytime, understand?[ST:wait ]
